basic_functionality.name: バージョン確認
basic_functionality.details:
usage: github-review-prompts [-h]
                             [--persona {code-reviewer,security-analyst,performance-optimizer}]
                             [--format {markdown,json,text}] [--no-confirm]
                             [--auto-commit] [--include-resolved]
                             [--author AUTHOR] [--since SINCE]
                             [--file-pattern FILE_PATTERN]
                             [--reply-to REPLY_TO]
                             [--reply-message REPLY_MESSAGE]
                             [--reply-template {fixed,acknowledged,investigating,clarification,wontfix}]
                             [--output OUTPUT] [--append] [--save-file]
                             [--no-color] [--debug] [--token TOKEN]
                             [--api-url API_URL]
                             pr_url
github-review-prompts: error: the following arguments are required: pr_url
